hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||'';if(!f)process.exit(0);try{const lines=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').split('\n').length;if(lines>3000){console.error('\x1b[31m⛔ OVER LIMIT: '+f+' has '+lines+' lines (max 3000) — split it now!\x1b[0m');process.exit(1);}else if(lines>2500){console.warn('\x1b[33m⚠️  WARNING: '+f+' has '+lines+' lines — approaching 3000 limit\x1b[0m');}}catch(e){}"
